news.t: DoubleLine Ultrashort Income ETF (DLUX) Lists on NYSE Arca Exchange

overview.description: The DoubleLine Ultrashort Income ETF (DLUX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns through a portfolio of investment-grade, USD-denominated fixed-income securities. The fund maintains an ultra-short duration. DLUX was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by DoubleLine.

data.title: DoubleLine Ultrashort Income ETF (DLUX) Lists on NYSE Arca Exchange
data.text: TAMPA, Fla., April 1, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The DoubleLine Ultrashort Income ETF (ticker DLUX), an exchanged-traded fund actively invested in a diversified portfolio of investment-grade, short-term sec...
